# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: webapp-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: webapp
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: webapp
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: webapp
          image: your-webapp-image:latest
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: memcached-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: memcached
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: memcached
          image: memcached:latest
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: workers-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 4
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: workers
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: workers
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: workers
          image: your-workers-image:latest
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: memcached-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: memcached
  ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 11211
      targetPort: 11211
      name: memcached
